step_1_image_prompt: A 25-year-old Mediterranean woman with sun-kissed deep-tan skin, green almond eyes, and brunette-with-blonde-balayage waves to her mid-back, captured in a candid amateur smartphone snapshot with natural skin texture and visible pores. She is wearing a cream ribbed seamless cropped tank with a built-in shelf bra and matching cream high-waist seamless leggings, small gold huggie earrings, a thin gold pendant necklace, hair down in soft natural waves with a center part, bare feet, clean neutral nails. She stands in a premium pilates studio facing a tall floor-to-ceiling mirror, a sage-green reformer machine behind her, warm marble floor, exposed brick side wall, a tall window on her left letting in late-afternoon sun. Standing three-quarter angle to the mirror, weight on her left leg, right knee slightly bent, upright posture with a soft confident smile. Her right hand is raised at face level holding a phone capturing the mirror reflection. Her left hand rests at chest level, palm relaxed, fingers in a soft open position, currently empty. Both hands are visible in the frame, not in her pockets, not behind her back, not cropped out. Soft warm natural daylight pours through the tall window on her left, late afternoon, warm bone tones across the marble floor, gentle warm rim on her left side. Shot on iPhone 15 Pro front camera. Real photograph, not AI-generated, no model pose, candid moment. Post-class composed polished mood, palette of cream, beige, sage green, warm marble bone. Reference image is the persona — preserve her face, eye color, eye shape, brow shape, nose shape, lip shape, jaw line, and hair color exactly. Do not improvise her face.
